strategy: This is a 64,870-health boss - fight it as a team with a Storm hitter, supports, and a healer. Funnel blades to one hitter.
Hit Storm. Storm is not in his resist list and gets +30% incoming, while he resists 66% Myth and 36% almost everything else.
Do not use Damage-over-Time spells. A DoT makes him Shift it back onto the caster. If you must, cast Shift yourself to push it back to him and he will not re-Shift.
Play around his 3-round shield cycle: round 1 a -25% tower, round 2 a -50% tower, round 3 a -90% tower, repeating. The round-1 -25% tower is the weakest window.
Pop his tower with a small hit or hit on the -25% round, then land the funneled Storm hit. Line up your big swing so it is not eaten by the -90% tower on rounds 3, 6, 9.
cheatNotes: Casting a Damage-over-Time on him makes him Shift the DoT back onto the caster.
A spell that applies multiple DoT effects triggers the Shift once per effect.
If you cast Shift yourself to push the DoT back to him, he will not Shift it again.
On round 1 and every 3rd round after, he shields with a -25% Tower Shield - the weakest of the cycle and your best hit window.
On round 2 and every 3rd round after, he shields with a standard -50% Tower Shield.
On round 3 and every 3rd round after, he shields with a -90% Tower Shield. Do not waste your big hit into this.
